data.title: Dollar General raises sales outlook, plots next steps for ecommerce and retail media
data.description: Dollar General's CEO spoke about digital plans as the retailer announced sales grew 5.3% year over year in Q1.

data.title: JAGGAER names first chief digital officer to advance agentic AI
data.description: The move signals a major step forward in JAGGAER’s push into “Agentic AI,” a term it uses to describe autonomous software agents that perform procurement tasks with minimal human intervention.

data.title: Kimberly-Clark spins off tissue unit to focus on digital growth
data.description: “Consumers are already shifting how and where they buy these products,” said a company executive. “This deal helps us move faster and smarter across digital channels.”

data.title: BlueLinx accelerates digital transformation to enhance ecommerce
data.description: BlueLinx’s new master data management platform is designed to streamline internal processes, while the company’s ecommerce platform, currently in its pilot phase, is set to provide customers with a more convenient way to purchase building products online.

data.title: Survey: Consumers share how tariffs have already impacted their online shopping behaviors
data.description: With the vast majority of consumers surveyed saying the tariffs driving up prices, 56.5% want retailers to offer U.S.-sourced alternatives.
